title: Piquant Flaky Argentinian Naan Flatbread
description: Citrusy and flaky, this post-workout flatbread blends Argentinian flavors with whole30-friendly ingredients for a quick, satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and line a baking sheet with parchment.
Whisk almond flour, baking soda, salt, smoked paprika, cumin and cayenne pepper in a bowl.
Add warm water, olive oil, lemon zest and lemon juice and stir until dough forms.
Knead dough on a floured surface until smooth, about 2 minutes.
Divide dough into 4 equal portions and roll each into a 6-inch circle.
Brush each flatbread lightly with olive oil and sprinkle parsley and cilantro on top.
Bake on the prepared sheet for 12 minutes until golden and flaky.
Remove from oven and let cool for 3 minutes.
Slice into squares and serve warm with your choice of protein.
